items.question: National ID Card
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai national ID cards into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.question: Birth Certificate
items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai birth certificates into English in embassy-accepted formats.

items.answer: Supports filling and translating Thai house registrations into English in embassy-accepted formats.

article.title: Introduction
article.description: Dooform helps businesses and translators fill, translate, and export official documents in embassy-accepted formats.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Dooform is a document-processing platform built for Thai government documents and enterprise paperwork. Fill forms once, translate instantly, and export in the format your destination requires.

sections.heading: Who is Dooform for?
sections.body: Business owners managing high document volume, professional translators producing embassy-ready output, and developers integrating document workflows into existing systems.

sections.heading: Next steps
sections.body: Follow the quick start to fill your first document, or jump to the API reference to wire Dooform into your backend.

quick-start.title: Quick start
quick-start.description: Fill your first document in under five minutes.

sections.heading: 1. Sign up
sections.body: Create an account at dooform.com and verify your email.

sections.heading: 2. Choose a template
sections.body: Pick from the official government templates or upload your own.

sections.heading: 3. Fill and export
sections.body: Fill the fields, preview the output, and download the finished PDF.

concepts.title: Core concepts
concepts.description: The handful of ideas that make Dooform click.

sections.heading: Templates
sections.body: A template is a reusable form layout with typed placeholders.

sections.heading: Fields
sections.body: Fields are the inputs that fill a template — text, dates, IDs, addresses.

sections.heading: Documents
sections.body: A document is a filled template — stored, versioned, and exportable.

national-id.title: National ID card
national-id.description: Fill and translate Thai national ID cards into embassy-accepted English.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Supports the Thai national ID card layout. Automatically transliterates Thai names to English following RTGS rules.

birth-certificate.title: Birth certificate
birth-certificate.description: Fill and translate Thai birth certificates into English.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Supports the standard Thai birth certificate (Tor. Ror. 1/1).

house-registration.title: House registration
house-registration.description: Fill and translate Thai house registration (Tabien Baan) into English.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Supports both the blue (resident) and yellow (non-resident) house registration books.

marriage-certificate.title: Marriage certificate
marriage-certificate.description: Fill and translate Thai marriage certificates into English.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Supports Kor. Ror. 2 with parallel English translation.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Get notified when a document is processed.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Configure a webhook URL in your org settings. Dooform POSTs a signed payload on document.created, document.updated, and document.finalized.

api.title: API reference
api.description: Automate document generation with the Dooform REST API.

sections.heading: Authentication
sections.body: Use a bearer token issued from your org's Developer settings. All requests use HTTPS.

featuresPage.heading: Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Everything you need to process, translate, and export official documents — all in one platform.

highlights.title: Smart Document Processing
highlights.description: Auto-fill government forms with intelligent field mapping. Dooform understands Thai document layouts and maps your data to the correct fields, eliminating manual entry and reducing errors.

highlights.title: Developer-First API
highlights.description: Integrate document generation into your workflow with our REST API. Generate up to 1,000 documents per batch, receive webhook notifications, and automate your entire document pipeline.

quote.text: Dooform cut our document processing time by 90%. What used to take our team hours now happens in seconds.
quote.author: Document Operations Manager

items.title: Template Library
items.description: Pre-built templates for Thai government documents including ID cards, birth certificates, and marriage certificates.

items.title: Multi-language Translation
items.description: Automatic Thai-to-English translation following RTGS transliteration rules, accepted by embassies worldwide.

items.title: Team Collaboration
items.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and manage permissions. Track who filled what and when.

items.title: Batch Processing
items.description: Process thousands of documents at once via API. Generate up to 1,000 files per 10 seconds.

items.title: Data Security
items.description: Enterprise-grade encryption for all stored data. Compliant with Thai PDPA regulations.

items.title: Custom Documents
items.description: Create your own document templates with Dooform's syntax. Support any layout your business needs.

items.title: Export Options
items.description: Download completed documents as PDF, or integrate with your existing systems via API.

items.title: AI Verification
items.description: AI-powered data verification catches errors before they reach the final document.

items.title: Webhook Notifications
items.description: Get notified instantly when documents are created, updated, or finalized.

developer.heading: Built for developers
developer.subtitle: A complete API for document automation

hero.heading: Your Data Security Is Our Foundation
hero.subtitle: Dooform is built from the ground up with enterprise-grade security and full compliance with Thai data protection regulations.

items.title: Data Encryption
items.description: All data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3. Your documents and personal information are protected at every stage.

items.title: Access Control
items.description: Role-based access control ensures only authorized team members can view, edit, or export documents. Every action is logged.

items.title: Privacy by Design
items.description: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services. Data minimization and purpose limitation are core to our architecture.

items.title: Infrastructure
items.description: Hosted on ISO 27001-certified cloud infrastructure with automated backups, disaster recovery, and 99.9% uptime SLA.

items.name: PDPA Compliance
items.description: Fully compliant with the Thailand Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA). We maintain lawful data processing, consent management, and data subject rights.

items.name: Data Retention Policy
items.description: Clear and configurable data retention periods per plan. Data is permanently deleted upon request or after the retention period expires.

items.name: Consent Management
items.description: Built-in consent tracking for document data collection. Users maintain full control over their data and can withdraw consent at any time.

items.name: Audit Trail
items.description: Complete audit logging of all document operations, access events, and administrative changes for compliance reporting.

items.name: Data Portability
items.description: Export all your data in standard formats at any time. We support your right to data portability as mandated by PDPA.

items.name: Incident Response
items.description: Documented incident response procedures with 72-hour notification to affected parties and regulators as required by law.

dataFlow.heading: How We Protect Your Data
dataFlow.subtitle: Every document passes through multiple layers of security from input to export.

steps.title: Secure Input
steps.description: Data is encrypted immediately upon submission via TLS 1.3. Input validation prevents injection attacks.

steps.title: Encrypted Processing
steps.description: Documents are processed in isolated environments. No data is shared across tenants or stored in logs.

steps.title: Access-Controlled Storage
steps.description: Completed documents are stored with AES-256 encryption and scoped access policies per organization.

steps.title: Safe Export
steps.description: Exports are generated on demand over encrypted channels. Temporary files are purged immediately after delivery.

commitment.heading: Our Commitment to Trust
commitment.body: Security is not a feature we added — it is the foundation we built on. We continuously audit our systems, update our practices, and invest in protecting the data you entrust to us.

planPage.heading: Pricing
planPage.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your needs
planPage.footnote: All plans are billed monthly. All prices in THB. Pricing is subject to change.

trial.heading: Try for Free
trial.subtitle: Simply register and start filling in your data right away
trial.consent: By registering, you consent to the collection of your usage data.
